mapper.sql: FROM laptop l JOIN brand b ON b.id = l.brand_id LEFT JOIN cpu_spec c ON c.id = l.cpu_id LEFT JOIN gpu_spec g ON g.id = l.gpu_id LEFT JOIN memory_spec m ON m.id = l.memory_id LEFT JOIN storage_spec st ON st.id = l.storage_id LEFT JOIN screen_spec sc ON sc.id = l.screen_id LEFT JOIN battery_spec ba ON ba.id = l.battery_id LEFT JOIN wireless_spec wi ON wi.id = l.wireless_id LEFT JOIN price_record pr ON pr.id = ( SELECT pr2.id FROM price_record pr2 WHERE pr2.laptop_id = l.id ORDER BY pr2.crawled_at DESC, pr2.id DESC LIMIT 1 )

where.if: AND ( l.model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR l.raw_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR b.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, b.name AS brand_name, l.model, l.product_type, l.usage_positioning, l.weight_kg, l.image_url, l.source_url, l.release_date, pr.price AS latest_price, c.model AS cpu_model, g.model AS gpu_model, g.gpu_type, m.capacity_gb AS memory_capacity_gb, st.capacity_gb AS storage_capacity_gb, sc.size_inch AS screen_size_inch, sc.resolution AS screen_resolution, sc.refresh_rate_hz
ORDER BY pr.price IS NULL, pr.price ASC, l.id DESC
ORDER BY pr.price IS NULL, pr.price DESC, l.id DESC
ORDER BY l.weight_kg IS NULL, l.weight_kg ASC, l.id DESC
ORDER BY sc.size_inch IS NULL, sc.size_inch DESC, l.id DESC
ORDER BY COALESCE(pr.crawled_at, l.updated_at) DESC, l.id DESC
LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.size}

SELECT l.id, b.name AS brand_name, l.model, l.product_type, l.usage_positioning, l.weight_kg, l.thickness_mm, l.os, l.color, l.image_url, l.source_url, l.source_name, l.raw_title, l.release_date, pr.price AS latest_price, c.brand AS cpu_brand, c.model AS cpu_model, c.core_count AS cpu_core_count, c.thread_count AS cpu_thread_count, c.base_power_w AS cpu_base_power_w, g.brand AS gpu_brand, g.model AS gpu_model, g.gpu_type, g.vram_gb AS gpu_vram_gb, m.capacity_gb AS memory_capacity_gb, m.memory_type, m.frequency_mhz AS memory_frequency_mhz, st.capacity_gb AS storage_capacity_gb, st.storage_type, st.interface_type AS storage_interface_type, sc.size_inch AS screen_size_inch, sc.resolution AS screen_resolution, sc.refresh_rate_hz AS screen_refresh_rate_hz, sc.panel_type AS screen_panel_type, sc.color_gamut_percent AS screen_color_gamut_percent, sc.brightness_nit AS screen_brightness_nit, sc.touch_support AS screen_touch_support, ba.capacity_wh AS battery_capacity_wh, ba.charge_power AS battery_charge_power, wi.wifi_version, wi.bluetooth_version, port_group.port_summary
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT lp.laptop_id, GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT(ps.port_name, ' x', lp.port_count) ORDER BY ps.port_name SEPARATOR '；' ) AS port_summary FROM laptop_port lp JOIN port_spec ps ON ps.id = lp.port_id GROUP BY lp.laptop_id ) port_group ON port_group.laptop_id = l.id WHERE l.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT b.name FROM brand b JOIN laptop l ON l.brand_id = b.id GROUP BY b.name ORDER BY b.name
SELECT DISTINCT l.product_type FROM laptop l WHERE l.product_type IS NOT NULL AND l.product_type != '' ORDER BY l.product_type
SELECT DISTINCT l.usage_positioning FROM laptop l WHERE l.usage_positioning IS NOT NULL AND l.usage_positioning != '' ORDER BY l.usage_positioning
SELECT DISTINCT g.gpu_type FROM laptop l JOIN gpu_spec g ON g.id = l.gpu_id WHERE g.gpu_type IS NOT NULL AND g.gpu_type != '' ORDER BY g.gpu_type
SELECT DISTINCT m.capacity_gb FROM laptop l JOIN memory_spec m ON m.id = l.memory_id WHERE m.capacity_gb IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.capacity_gb
SELECT DISTINCT st.capacity_gb FROM laptop l JOIN storage_spec st ON st.id = l.storage_id WHERE st.capacity_gb IS NOT NULL ORDER BY st.capacity_gb
SELECT DISTINCT sc.size_inch FROM laptop l JOIN screen_spec sc ON sc.id = l.screen_id WHERE sc.size_inch IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sc.size_inch

SELECT MIN(pr.price) AS min, MAX(pr.price) AS max FROM laptop l LEFT JOIN price_record pr ON pr.id = ( SELECT pr2.id FROM price_record pr2 WHERE pr2.laptop_id = l.id ORDER BY pr2.crawled_at DESC, pr2.id DESC LIMIT 1 )
SELECT MIN(l.weight_kg) AS min, MAX(l.weight_kg) AS max FROM laptop l WHERE l.weight_kg IS NOT NULL
